name: Noctua NF-A12x25 PWM
description: The Noctua NF-A12x25 PWM is a premium 120mm cooling fan renowned for its exceptional balance of high airflow and static pressure, alongside ultra-quiet operation. It serves as an excellent all-rounder, making it ideal for PC cases, CPU heatsinks, and water-cooling radiators.

name: Corsair iCUE AF120 RGB Elite
description: The Corsair iCUE AF120 RGB Elite is a high-performance 120mm PWM fan that combines powerful cooling, whisper-quiet operation, and vivid customizable lighting. Equipped with AirGuide technology, fluid dynamic bearings, and 8 individually addressable RGB LEDs, it is ideal for PC cases, liquid coolers, and heatsinks.
